steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is the phrase “she took comfort in understanding the world around her”. This indicates the correct answer must show her comfort arising from grasping structured/natural order in her environment.

steps.title: Connect the signal to the correct choice
steps.content:
D describes her reflecting on the ordered march of the stars and the law behind them, which fortifies her.

This matches the claim that understanding (structured natural phenomena) brings comfort.
A, B, and C each focus on struggle, environment, or action rather than structured understanding.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
